CustomField.description: URL or Salesforce Files path where the completed AR export package can be downloaded. For Metadata Only exports, points to a CSV/JSON ContentVersion created by the batch. For Full Package exports, points to a ZIP archive or a Content Delivery URL. Null until export status is Complete.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Download location for the completed AR package. Available when Export Status = Complete.
CustomField.label: Export Download URL
